name: CCL Products India
message: [AI generated] CCL Products India is a leading manufacturer and exporter of instant coffee. It was established in 1994 and is headquartered in Hyderabad, India. The company has coffee processing units in multiple regions offering a wide range of coffee products including freeze-dried, spray-dried, and agglomerated coffees. CCL distributes its products globally in bulk packaging, as well as private labeled direct consumer packaging. They are widely respected for their sustainable and socially responsible business practices.
